articles.title: Uniswap contributors propose deploying DEX on Coinbase’s Layer 2 Base
articles.description: The contributors to Uniswap, the largest decentralized exchange, have begun deliberations on the possibility of launching the on Base network.

articles.title: Near Protocol to use Wormhole bridge for cross-chain transfers
articles.description: Near and Wormhole developers are collaborating on light client solutions that can support cross-chain bridge transfers.

articles.title: XRP surges as judge orders SEC to release Hinman files
articles.description: A judge has ruled that the SEC must share documents relating to former director Hinman's speech wherein he said Ethereum wasn't a security.

articles.title: Tokens built on Dogecoin result in all-time high in daily transactions
articles.description: Dogecoin network’s daily transactions hit a record high, peaking at over 719,000 with users minting meme tokens via an Ordinals-like system.

articles.title: Three Top Crypto Analysts Predict Big Rally for Bitcoin (BTC) – Here Are Their Targets
articles.description: Three widely followed crypto analysts have similar opinions that Bitcoin (BTC) is likely gearing up for a parabolic surge. Crypto strategist Michaël van de Poppe tells his 656,700 Twitter followers that Bitcoin is flashing bullish signals on the weekly chart. According to the analyst, Bitcoin continues to trade above two crucial technical indicators on the […]

articles.title: XRP gains as SEC motion denied; NFT index down; US investors anticipate debt ceiling deal
articles.description: Bitcoin prices fell on Wednesday morning in Asia but remained above the US$27,000 line. Ether gained but still posted a weekly drop. XRP led gainers among other top 10 non-stablecoin cryptocurrencies.
